task_completion.description: Crawl the target URL using Screaming Frog SEO Spider with JavaScript rendering enabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is open, showing a completed or in-progress crawl of 'https://quotes.toscrape.com/js/'. The results should ideally show columns for both 'Word Count' and 'Rendered Word Count'.

task_completion.description: Export the 'Internal - HTML' report to a CSV file in the specified exports directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor showing a CSV file located in '~/Documents/SEO/exports/'. Alternatively, the Screaming Frog export dialog saving to this specific path.

task_completion.description: Create the analysis report file at the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file 'js_rendering_report.txt' located in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'.

task_completion.description: The report includes the total number of pages crawled
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside 'js_rendering_report.txt' explicitly mentions the total number of pages crawled (should be 10 pages).

task_completion.description: The report includes observations on word count differences between Original and Rendered content
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside 'js_rendering_report.txt' compares the original/raw HTML word count (approx. 17 words) with the rendered word count (approx. 192 words), noting the gap.

task_completion.description: The report provides a recommendation on whether the site relies on Client-Side Rendering
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside 'js_rendering_report.txt' explicitly concludes or recommends that the site relies heavily on Client-Side Rendering (CSR) based on the findings.

integrity.description: The agent actually used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot shows the Screaming Frog SEO Spider application open and interacting with the target website, rather than the agent just faking a CSV file via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The CSV export appears to be a genuine Screaming Frog export
integrity.visual_evidence: If the CSV is visible, it contains standard Screaming Frog headers (e.g., Address, Content, Status Code, Title 1, Word Count, Rendered Word Count) rather than a manually typed mock file.

integrity.description: The report contains genuine data from the crawl rather than hallucinated placeholders
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the report align with the actual site (10 pages, ~17 raw words, ~192 rendered words). The agent did not just copy-paste the prompt instructions into the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://quotes.toscrape.com/js/. The site has exactly 10 pagination pages. Raw HTML contains only about 17 visible words in the body. When JavaScript rendering is enabled, the rendered word count is approximately 192 words per page (10 quotes + 10 authors). The report should reflect this significant content gap (approx 17 vs 192 words) and conclude that the site relies heavily on Client-Side Rendering.
